scripts.build: npm --prefix react-hydration run build && npm --prefix next-hydration run build && npm --prefix node-streaming-ssr run build
scripts.dev: npm --prefix react-hydration run build && (npm --prefix next-hydration run dev & npm --prefix node-streaming-ssr run dev)
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix react-hydration run typecheck && npm --prefix next-hydration run typecheck && npm --prefix node-streaming-ssr run typecheck
